caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a room filled with apparel. His t-shirt features the text "NOW NEVER DO" above the word "SHIT" in large, distressed white letters. The background contains clothing racks, mannequins, and framed pictures on the wall. To his right, a banner reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and another logo shows "VRM VIRTUAL REALITY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and talking, while the camera angle shifts from a close-up of his face to a wider shot that reveals another person standing to the right wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt. The wider shot also shows additional microphones on stands. On-screen graphics including logos and the text "BOOK TH US!" are visible at the bottom of the frames.
